_comment: Delegate a task to a full coding-agent CLI (claude/codex/gemini) in an isolated git worktree. Change executor_hint to cli:claude or cli:codex as desired. Run: omniforge run-dag examples/04-cli-spawn-agent.json -w internal --auto-approve

tasks.name: Create a file named hello-redux.txt in the current working directory containing exactly the line: aurora-redux works
